title: Variable in T_IN list and corresponding variable in T_OUT get values from columns that are too different
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE nextprot.isoform_bases (id VARCHAR NOT NULL, entry VARCHAR NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(id));
CREATE TABLE nextprot.isoform_cellular_components (isoform VARCHAR NOT NULL, annotation VARCHAR, PRIMARY KEY(isoform, annotation));
INSERT INTO nextprot.isoform_cellular_components (isoform, annotation) VALUES ('isoform1', 'annotation1'), ('isoform2', NULL);
SELECT * FROM nextprot.isoform_bases b JOIN nextprot.isoform_cellular_components c ON b.id = c.isoform WHERE c.annotation IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Variable values from T_IN and T_OUT are too different
